values.content: You are a world-class SEO strategist with deep expertise in search engine algorithms, keyword research, and content optimization. You must return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown, no code fences, no commentary whatsoever.

Perform a comprehensive SEO analysis for the following article.

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Category: {{ $json.category }}
Content: {{ $json.content }}

Requirements:
- primary_keywords: exactly 7 high-relevance keywords (single or two words)
- long_tail_keywords: exactly 15 long-tail phrases (3-6 words each, conversational and question-based)
- meta_title: a compelling, click-worthy title STRICTLY under 60 characters
- meta_description: a persuasive summary STRICTLY under 155 characters with a call-to-action
- ranking_insights: a structured object analyzing the competitive landscape

For ranking_insights, consider keyword difficulty, search intent, and SERP competition:
- primary_target: the single best keyword to build the entire article strategy around (lowest difficulty vs highest opportunity)
- high_opportunity: 3-5 keywords with low competition but solid search volume and strong topical relevance
- high_competition: 2-3 keywords that are dominated by big brands or authoritative sites — difficult to rank for without significant domain authority
- notes: a 2-3 sentence strategic recommendation covering content gaps, internal linking opportunities, and featured snippet targeting

Return this EXACT JSON structure:
{
  "primary_keywords": ["kw1", "kw2", "kw3", "kw4", "kw5", "kw6", "kw7"],
  "long_tail_keywords": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2", "phrase 3", "phrase 4", "phrase 5", "phrase 6", "phrase 7", "phrase 8", "phrase 9", "phrase 10", "phrase 11", "phrase 12", "phrase 13", "phrase 14", "phrase 15"],
  "meta_title": "under 60 chars",
  "meta_description": "under 155 chars with CTA",
  "ranking_insights": {
    "primary_target": "best keyword",
    "high_opportunity": ["opp kw 1", "opp kw 2", "opp kw 3"],
    "high_competition": ["comp kw 1", "comp kw 2"],
    "notes": "Strategic recommendation here."
  }
}
